description_long: A generous serving of wide, flat pappardelle pasta is heaped onto a square white plate, coated in a rich, chunky tomato-based sauce. The sauce appears to contain ground meat, likely beef or pork, and is garnished with fresh, roughly chopped basil leaves. The pasta is slightly curled and layered, with visible ridges and folds that catch the sauce. The dish has a rustic, homemade appearance, with sauce pooling slightly at the base and some oil separation visible. The plate is clean and modern, providing a stark contrast to the warm, earthy tones of the pasta and sauce. The overall presentation is hearty and inviting, suitable for a restaurant or street food setting.
description: A mound of pappardelle pasta in a chunky tomato-meat sauce, garnished with fresh basil, sits on a square white plate. The dish looks rustic and appetizing, with visible folds of pasta and a rich, textured sauce.
description_view_0: A front view of the pasta shows the layered noodles and generous sauce, with basil garnish clearly visible on top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the height and volume of the pasta pile, with more sauce and pasta folds visible on the left side.
description_view_2: From this side, the sauce appears to have pooled slightly at the base, and the pasta's texture and folds are prominent.
description_view_3: This view shows the pasta mound from the opposite side, with the basil garnish and sauce distributed more evenly across the top.
attribute_placement: piled on a square white plate
